case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. LORJEAN MARC SAGABEAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-05-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-18-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-26-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-28-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-18-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
